headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Clorox (CLX) Bond Issuance And Lowered Earnings Guidance
summary: Earlier in May 2026, Clorox completed several fixed-rate bond offerings totaling about US$1.50 billion, issuing callable senior unsecured notes maturing in 2031, 2033, and 2036, with Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley added as co-lead underwriters on part of the financing. These bond deals, coming soon after Clorox’s mixed quarterly results and reduced full-year earnings guidance, highlight how the company is actively managing its balance sheet while facing uneven category trends and...
